name: Chocolate Sugar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Microwave chocolate and butter in a large microwavable bowl on HIGH for 2 minutes or until the butter is melted. Stir until the chocolate is completely melted.
Stir 1 cup of sugar into the melted chocolate mixture until well blended. Stir in the egg and vanilla until completely blended. Mix in the flour, baking soda, and salt. Refrigerate for 30 minutes.
Preheat oven to 375°F. Shape dough into 1-inch balls; roll in additional sugar. Place 2 inches apart on ungreased cookie sheets.
Bake 8-10 minutes or until set. Remove from cookie sheets to cool on wire racks.
Makes about 3 1/2 dozen cookies.
Prep time: 15 minutes. Chill time: 30 minutes. Baking time: 8-10 minutes.
JAM-FILLED CHOCOLATE SUGAR COOKIES:
Prepare Chocolate Sugar Cookie dough as directed. Roll in finely chopped nuts instead of sugar. Make an indentation in each ball; fill the center with your favorite jam. Bake as directed.
CHOCOLATE-CARAMEL SUGAR COOKIES:
Prepare Chocolate Sugar Cookie dough as directed. Roll in finely chopped nuts instead of sugar. Make an indentation in each ball; bake as directed. Microwave 1 package (14 ounces) KRAFT Caramels with 2 tablespoons milk in a microwavable bowl on HIGH for 3 minutes or until melted, stirring after 2 minutes. Fill centers of cookies with caramel mixture. Drizzle with melted BAKER'S Semi-Sweet Chocolate.
